title: Charles Peterson
text:
Summary
Business Analytics graduate with hands-on experience using SQL, Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, Excel, Python, and R to support reporting, dashboard development, data cleaning, and operational decision-making. Experienced in healthcare analytics, logistics, financial reporting, and process improvement.

title: Charles Peterson
text:
Technical Skills

Data Analytics
Power BI, DAX, SQL, Excel, Python, R Studio, Microsoft Fabric, Power Query, Dataflows, data modeling, reporting, KPI tracking, dashboard development.


Business and Operations
Process improvement, financial reporting, healthcare operations, logistics support, data accuracy, documentation, customer service, regulatory compliance.


Additional Experience
Forklift, reach truck, order picker, Moffett, tractor trailer, skid steer, CDL Class A.

title: Charles Peterson
text:
Professional Experience
Data Analyst Intern | Cascadia Healthcare 2026
Eagle, ID

Managed data security and user access permissions within Microsoft Fabric and Power BI.
Supported row-level security, workspace access, reporting permissions, and audit controls.
Connected data from SharePoint Excel files, SQL databases, SFTP sources, and Lakehouse/Warehouse data sources.
Improved Power BI refresh scheduling to support reliable reporting and reduce failed refreshes.
Wrote and optimized SQL queries for reporting, data pulling, and duration time load balancing.
Created SQL reports for license renewal and fine penalty reporting.
Followed HIPAA regulations while working with sensitive healthcare data.

CDL Flat Bed Driver | Lowe’s Home Improvement 2025 - 2026
Idaho Falls, ID

Managed logistics operations for project sites and large equipment deliveries.
Maintained accurate delivery records and followed DOT and OSHA safety requirements.
Supported inventory flow, delivery coordination, and customer service.
Improved delivery efficiency by planning routes and reducing delays.

Certified Pharmacy Technician | Cache Valley Pharmacy 2024
Logan, UT

Maintained patient medical records while following healthcare regulations.
Supported pharmacy operations through documentation accuracy and inventory tracking.
Assisted with secure medication distribution and patient service workflows.

title: Charles Peterson
text:
Certifications
Data Science Certificate
Business Fundamentals Certificate
Class A CDL
Certified Pharmacy Technician, CPhT

title: Charles Peterson
text:
Projects

Power BI and Microsoft Fabric Reporting

Supported healthcare reporting through Power BI dashboards, SQL queries, Microsoft Fabric workspaces, and access control processes.
Helped improve report reliability through refresh scheduling, query improvements, and data source management.



Data Cleaning and Visualization in R

Built data cleaning, transformation, and visualization projects using R, tidyverse, ggplot2, Quarto, and GitHub Pages.
Created visual reports using real-world datasets involving finance, geography, operations, and text analysis.



SQL Reporting and Data Management

Wrote SQL queries to pull, clean, join, and summarize business data.
Practiced database design, joins, subqueries, transactions, and reporting logic.

title: Charles Peterson Resume
text: Business analytics, data analytics, financial operations, healthcare analytics, business intelligence, dashboard development, SQL reporting, and process improvement.
